title: U.S. Air Force refueler crashes in Iraq while supporting Iran war
summary_full: Rescue efforts are ongoing, officials said, after the KC-135 tanker was involved in an apparent accident with another KC-135.
summary_public: Rescue efforts are ongoing, officials said, after the KC-135 tanker was involved in an apparent accident with another KC-135.

IQ.label: negative
IQ.evidence: crashes in Iraq while supporting Iran war
